---
description: "Workspace-wide Next.js 16 UI conventions for this project."
applyTo: "**"
---

# Next.js Workspace Conventions

- Use Next.js 16 App Router, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS.
- Prefer shadcn/ui for UI components.
- Use framer-motion for animations when needed.
- Use absolute imports like @/components/... for component paths.
- Keep Storybook files and component files aligned with the repo's existing naming and placement patterns.
- When implementing Next.js behavior, check the relevant guides in node_modules/next/dist/docs/ and follow deprecation notices.
